items.name: Wedding Stationery
items.description: Invitations, menus, place cards, programmes and on-the-day signage. A complete suite, designed and printed for your most important day.

items.name: Business Cards & Corporate
items.description: Make a lasting impression. Letterpress business cards speak before you do — a physical statement of quality that no digital alternative can match.

items.name: Custom Prints & Art
items.description: Limited edition art prints, typographic posters, bespoke keepsakes and special occasion prints. If you can imagine it, we can press it.

items.name: Graphic Design
items.description: Every piece starts with thoughtful, considered design. Katerina’s background in graphic design means the concept is as refined as the print.
